description.ko: 환경 자체가 디지털 정보에 반응하는 비에 젖은 사이버펑크 도시 전경으로, 날씨와 데이터를 우울한 도시적 비주얼로 혼합합니다.
description.en: A rain-soaked cyberpunk cityscape where the environment itself reacts to digital information, blending weather and data into a melancholic urban visual.

prompt: A cinematic wide shot of NEON-V, titled 'The Data Rainfall.' Towering #1A0033 indigo megastructures are drenched in a heavy holographic downpour, where rain drops transform into #FF00FF magenta and #00FFFF cyan data-stream pixels upon impact. High-speed maglev vehicles leave long #FF6B35 orange light trails cutting through a dense, smoky volumetric atmosphere. Hyper-detailed tech-noir textures, ray-traced puddle reflections on wet metallic asphalt, and flickering lens flares from giant advertising screens. 8k resolution, capturing the melancholic soul of a future city.
